notes: Restored the saved activity list used by Goals and Routines so those tabs do not fail when a saved goal or routine is selected.
Converted Calendar export preview recurrence labels into plain English while leaving the hidden export details and .ics RRULE values in Google-compatible format.
Removed a nested optional expander from the activity form and replaced it with a simple optional reference-time checkbox for Google Tasks notes.
Moved guided setup navigation to side arrows beside the working content, leaving Skip setup for now as the only bottom button.
release: v0.6.8 setup navigation and export preview repair
release_name: Setup navigation and export preview repair
release_notes: Repairs the Goals and Routines tabs by restoring the saved activity list renderer, makes Calendar export preview recurrence text user-facing while preserving RRULE export format, removes the nested expander from the activity form, and moves setup navigation to side arrows with Skip setup as the only bottom button.
